lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰ ਕੀ ਮਲੁ ਕਬ ਹੀ ਨ ਜਾਏ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: antar kee mal kab hee na jaae |1|
lines.english: But still, the filth and pollution within never depart. ||1||
Within the mind dwell anger and massive ego.
Ritual cleansing baths are taken, and sacred marks are applied to the body.
Worship services are performed with great pomp and ceremony.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਉਤੀ ਮੁਦ੍ਰਾ ਮਨੁ ਮੋਹਿਆ ਮਾਇਆ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: bhgautee mudraa man mohiaa maaeaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The sacred mudras - ritualistic hand gestures - are made, but the mind remains enticed by Maya. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਤੁ ਸੰਜਮਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਕਿਨ ਹੀ ਨ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: eit sanjam prabh kin hee na paaeaa |
lines.english: No one has ever found God in this way.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਪ ਕਰਹਿ ਪੰਚਾਂ ਕੇ ਬਸਿ ਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: paap kareh panchaan ke bas re |
lines.english: They commit sins, under the influence of the five thieves.
They bathe at sacred shrines, and claim that everything has been washed off.
Then they commit them again, without fear of the consequences.
but those who have deception within wander lost like demons.
The sinners are bound and gagged, and taken to the City of Death. ||2||
The ankle-bells shake and the cymbals vibrate,
By destroying its hole, the snake is not killed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਸਭ ਕਿਛੁ ਜਾਨੈ ਜਿਨਿ ਤੂ ਕੀਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: prabh sabh kichh jaanai jin too keea |3|
lines.english: God, who created you, knows everything. ||3||
You worship fire and wear saffron colored robes.
Leaving your own country, you wander in foreign lands.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਪਦਾ ਕਾ ਮਾਰਿਆ ਗ੍ਰਿਹ ਤੇ ਨਸਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: apadaa kaa maariaa grih te nasataa |
lines.english: Stung by your misfortune, you abandon your home.
But you bring the five rejects with you. ||4||
You have split your ears, and now you steal crumbs.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਨਿਤਾ ਛੋਡਿ ਬਦ ਨਦਰਿ ਪਰ ਨਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: banitaa chhodd bad nadar par naaree |
lines.english: You have abandoned your own wife, but now you sneak glances at other women.

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਰਿ ਘਰਿ ਮਾਂਗੈ ਤ੍ਰਿਪਤਾਵਨ ਤੇ ਚੂਕਾ ॥
lines.translit: ghar ghar maangai tripataavan te chookaa |
lines.english: You beg from door to door, but you fail to be satisfied.
He does not speak; he is on silence.
God is not found by wearing religious robes; you are utterly miserable! ||5||
But he is filled with desire; he is made to wander in reincarnation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਨ ਤੇ ਰਹਤਾ ਦੁਖੁ ਦੇਹੀ ਸਹਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: an te rahataa dukh dehee sahataa |
lines.english: Abstaining from food, his body suffers in pain.
He does not realize the Hukam of the Lord's Command; he is afflicted by possessiveness. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਕਿਨੈ ਨ ਪਾਈ ਪਰਮ ਗਤੇ ॥
lines.translit: bin satigur kinai na paaee param gate |
lines.english: Without the True Guru, no one has attained the supreme status.
The self-willed manmukhs do useless deeds.
Go ahead and ask all the Vedas and the Simritees.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਬਾਲੂ ਘਰ ਠਉਰ ਨ ਠਾਈ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: jiau baaloo ghar tthaur na tthaaee |7|
lines.english: They are like a house of sand, which cannot stand. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕਾ ਬਚਨੁ ਤਿਨਿ ਬਾਧਿਓ ਪਾਲਾ ॥
lines.translit: gur kaa bachan tin baadhio paalaa |
lines.english: sews the Word of the Guru's Shabad into his robes.
One unto whom the Lord of the Universe becomes Merciful,
Out of millions, it is rare that such a Saint is seen.
O Nanak, with him, we are carried across. ||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਹੋਵੈ ਭਾਗੁ ਤਾ ਦਰਸਨੁ ਪਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: je hovai bhaag taa darasan paaeeai |
lines.english: If one has such good destiny, then the Blessed Vision of His Darshan is obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਤਰੈ ਸਭੁ ਕੁਟੰਬੁ ਤਰਾਈਐ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ਦੂਜਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: aap tarai sabh kuttanb taraaeeai |1| rahaau doojaa |2|
lines.english: He saves himself, and carries across all his family as well. ||1||SECOND PAUSE||2||
Prabhaatee, Fifth Mehl:
Meditating in remembrance on the Naam, all the sins are erased.
I have found the Sublime Essence of the Lord. The Supreme Lord God has melted into my heart. ||1||
Joining the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy,
The accounts held by the Righteous Judge of Dharma are torn up.
Your slaves seek the Sanctuary of Your Feet. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਰਮਤ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: raam ramat har har sukh paaeaa |
lines.english: Dwelling on the Lord, Har, Har, I have found peace.
The cycle of reincarnation is ended, and darkness is dispelled.
The Guru has revealed the door of liberation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰੇਮ ਭਗਤਿ ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਸਦ ਰਾਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: har prem bhagat man tan sad raataa |
lines.english: My mind and body are forever imbued with loving devotion to the Lord.
Now I know God, because He has made me know Him. ||2||
Hatred, conflict, fear and doubt have been eliminated.
He is contained in each and every heart.
Without Him, there is no one at all.
He has rescued me from the most dangerous waves.
God, the Soul of Pure Goodness, has manifested His Righteousness. ||3||
Separated from Him for countless lifetimes, I am united with Him once again.
Chanting, intense meditation and strict self-discipline are the contemplation of the Naam.
Bliss, peace and salvation are found in that place,
My Lord and Master has blessed me with His Glance of Grace. ||4||
